tagline: Genie One now has a Managed MCP Server (Beta).
what_it_does: Genie One now has a Managed MCP Server (Beta). Any agent can ask natural language data questions across Genie Spaces and Unity Catalog data and receive grounded answers. Preview This feature is in Public Preview.
why_it_matters: Governed: Unity Catalog enforces permissions, so agents and users access only the tools and data you grant them.
plain_summary: Genie One now has a Managed MCP Server (Beta). Any agent can ask natural language data questions across Genie Spaces and Unity Catalog data and receive grounded answers.
key_takeaway: Genie One now has a Managed MCP Server (Beta).
